use_cases: Display loading state during data fetching operations
Show progress during async content loading
Provide visual feedback during page transitions
Enhance user experience during API call waits
ai_summary: A honeycomb-patterned loading animation component featuring a geometric hex-grid design. This atomic feedback element displays a visually engaging loading indicator that can be used during data fetching, page transitions, or any async operation. The clean flat design makes it suitable for various interface contexts while maintaining visual interest through its honeycomb arrangement.
